title: Device V2 launch readiness decision report
releaseGate: Publish after Batches 001-004 have completed, or after their blockers are accepted as sufficient launch evidence. P0 may be ACCEPTED RISK only with explicit human acceptance.

stories.title: Compile Device V2 launch acceptance evidence index
stories.scope: Read evidence summaries from Batches 001-004 and build a compact index linking every P0 matrix item to evidence, blocker, or accepted risk.
stories.nonGoals: Do not rerun tests, do not modify product code, and do not perform cleanup.
acceptance: Every P0 test matrix row is PASS, BLOCKED, NOT RUN, or ACCEPTED RISK.
If 5-device parallel collection partially failed, evidence index must not auto-PASS; it must mark human decision required or record the accepted risk.

stories.title: Produce final go/no-go readiness report
stories.scope: Produce the final launch readiness report for Device V2 入库工作台 and 设备 V2 清册管理.
stories.nonGoals: Do not hide blockers, do not create new tests, and do not change acceptance criteria.
acceptance: Report states PASS, BLOCKED, or ACCEPTED RISK with reasons.
Report separates conclusions for Device V2 入库工作台 and 设备 V2 清册管理.
Report includes real import, real collection, edit/delete/cleanup, credential redaction, and original-record safety conclusions.
Report includes must-fix-before-launch and post-launch-watch-list sections.
